name: Beacon Hill Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the chocolate and butter in a saucepan over very low heat, stirring constantly until smooth. Cool slightly.
2. Beat the eggs, sugar, and vanilla in a large mixing bowl at high speed for 10 minutes.
3. Blend in the melted chocolate at low speed.
4. Add the flour, beating just to blend.
5. Stir in the chopped walnuts.
6. Spread the mixture into a greased 13x9" pan.
7. Bake at 375°F for 35-40 minutes (do not overbake).
8. Cool in the pan.
9. Cut into bars or squares. Makes 24-32.
